articles.title: Google Offers Free PC Upgrade For 500 Million Windows Users - Forbes
articles.description: All change for Windows — it's now decision time for 30% of all PC owners.

articles.title: WhatsApp is bringing Status updates to the top of the Chats tab - 9to5Mac
articles.description: The new WhatsApp build on TestFlight includes references to an upcoming change that will bring Status updates to the Chats tab.

articles.title: Mario Kart World Has Been Updated To Version 1.6.1, Here Are The Full Patch Notes - Nintendo Life
articles.description: This small update is available now

articles.title: Adobe’s low-processing camera app expands support to select iPads and the iPhone 17e - 9to5Mac
articles.description: The new update to Adobe’s experimental camera app adds initial support for iPads with at least 6GB of RAM and the new iPhone 17e.

articles.title: Forza Horizon 6 Is Every Japanese Driving Fantasy Rolled into One: Hands-On Preview - IGN
articles.description: The Forza Horizon series took a long time to land in Japan. After a few days in its meticulously modelled map, I’m doubtful I’ll ever want to leave.

articles.title: Marathon Budget Reportedly Revealed - IGN
articles.description: A new report has claimed Marathon’s budget is over $200 million, and while player numbers have fallen significantly since launch, Bungie’s extraction shooter is allegedly not facing an imminent shutdown.
